{{Quote|Admiral Jaeff is currently in command of the Imperial forces protecting the Corellian shipyards, but it is assumed he will be reporting to the more cunning Admiral Roek when the ''Aggressor'' arrives.|[[Dirk Harkness]]'s report|<ref name="R&R" />}}
'''Roek''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Starfleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Roek served as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and commanded the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Aggressor (Executor-class)|''Aggressor'']].

==Biography==
Around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Admiral Roek commanded the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Aggressor (Executor-class)|''Aggressor'']] and its escort of five [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="R&R" />

Six months after the Battle of Endor, Admiral Roek and his fleet were recalled to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] to defend the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], formerly the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="R&R" /> Roek replaced Admiral [[Jaeffis]] who was previously responsible for the defense of the [[CEC shipyards|Corellian shipyards]]<ref name="TCSWE1">{{CSWECite|II|133|Jaeffis, Admiral}}</ref> with his fleet of 25 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. As the New Republic prepared its [[Core Campaign|campaign]] to conquer the Core Worlds, [[Dirk Harkness]] of the [[Black Curs]] warned [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] about the upcoming arrival of Roek and the ''Aggressor'' in the Corellian system.<ref name="R&R" /> Admiral Roek and the ''Aggressor'' later defended the Imperial withdrawal from the Corellian system as the New Republic began conquering the Core Worlds.<ref name="TCSWE2">{{CSWECite|I|14|''Aggressor'' (I)}}</ref>

The ''Aggressor'' eventually passed into the hands of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Josef Grunger]].<ref name="TCSWE2" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> the Corellian system became the focus of the military power struggle within the Empire. While Grand Admiral Grunger was building up his forces in preparation for an attempt to seize the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], another Grand Admiral, [[Danetta Pitta]], allied himself with the Corellian [[Diktat]] [[Daclif Gallamby]] and took control of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], with a massive [[Grand Admiral Pitta's torpedo sphere|Torpedo Sphere]] as his command ship. The subsequent [[Battle of Tralus (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] decimated both fleets, including the ''Aggressor''.<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}}</ref>
